_meta.note: Curated Undertale location lore in our OWN words. FREE-bucket world knowledge. NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW.
_meta.wall: Describes the world; never the player's save state.

docs.title: The Ruins
docs.text: The Ruins are the first area of the Underground, where fallen humans arrive on a bed of golden flowers. They are a quiet maze of purple stone, simple puzzles, and gentle early monsters, watched over by Toriel.

docs.title: Snowdin
docs.text: Snowdin is a snow-covered forest and a cozy town of the same name, home to Sans and Papyrus. It features Papyrus's puzzles, a friendly town with an inn and shop, and a perpetual blanket of snow.

docs.title: Waterfall
docs.text: Waterfall is a dim, watery cavern of glowing echo flowers, wishing-star ceilings, and quiet ruins of monster history. It is where Undyne pursues the human, and where much of the Underground's old story is told on the walls.

docs.title: Hotland
docs.text: Hotland is a blazing region of lava, conveyor puzzles, and steam vents, home to Alphys's lab and the broadcasts of Mettaton. It leads toward the CORE, the facility that powers the Underground.

docs.title: The CORE
docs.text: The CORE is a vast mechanical facility that generates power for the Underground, a maze of shifting walkways near the end of Hotland on the path to New Home.

docs.title: New Home
docs.text: New Home is the grey capital city of the Underground and Asgore's residence, the last region before the barrier that seals the monsters beneath the mountain.
